dataFlows.transformKql: source | where isnotempty(tostring(siteId)) | extend _siteId = tostring(siteId), _hostId = tostring(hostId), _meta = meta, _stats = statistics, _permission = tostring(permission), _isOwner = tobool(isOwner), TimeGenerated = now(), SiteName = tostring(meta.name), Description = tostring(meta["desc"]), GatewayMac = tostring(meta.gatewayMac), Timezone = tostring(meta.timezone), TotalDevices = toint(statistics.counts.totalDevice), OfflineDevices = toint(statistics.counts.offlineDevice), OfflineWifiDevices = toint(statistics.counts.offlineWifiDevice), OfflineWiredDevices = toint(statistics.counts.offlineWiredDevice), OfflineGatewayDevices = toint(statistics.counts.offlineGatewayDevice), PendingUpdateDevices = toint(statistics.counts.pendingUpdateDevice), CriticalNotifications = toint(statistics.counts.criticalNotification), WifiClients = toint(statistics.counts.wifiClient), WiredClients = toint(statistics.counts.wiredClient), GuestClients = toint(statistics.counts.guestClient), WanUptimePct = todouble(statistics.percentages.wanUptime), WifiTxRetryPct = todouble(statistics.percentages.txRetry), IpsMode = tostring(statistics.gateway.ipsMode), InspectionState = tostring(statistics.gateway.inspectionState) | project-away siteId, hostId, meta, statistics, permission, isOwner | project-rename SiteId = _siteId, HostId = _hostId, Meta = _meta, SiteStatistics = _stats, Permission = _permission, IsOwner = _isOwner

source | where isnotempty(tostring(id)) | extend _id = tostring(id), _mac = tostring(mac), _name = tostring(name), _model = tostring(model), _shortname = tostring(shortname), _ip = tostring(ip), _productLine = tostring(productLine), _status = tostring(status), _version = tostring(version), _firmwareStatus = tostring(firmwareStatus), _updateAvailable = tostring(updateAvailable), _isConsole = tobool(isConsole), _isManaged = tobool(isManaged), _startupTime = tostring(startupTime), _adoptionTime = tostring(adoptionTime), _note = tostring(note), _uidb = uidb, TimeGenerated = now() | project-away id, mac, name, model, shortname, ip, productLine, status, version, firmwareStatus, updateAvailable, isConsole, isManaged, startupTime, adoptionTime, note, uidb | project-rename Id = _id, Mac = _mac, Name = _name, Model = _model, Shortname = _shortname, Ip = _ip, ProductLine = _productLine, Status = _status, Version = _version, FirmwareStatus = _firmwareStatus, UpdateAvailable = _updateAvailable, IsConsole = _isConsole, IsManaged = _isManaged, StartupTime = _startupTime, AdoptionTime = _adoptionTime, Note = _note, Uidb = _uidb

source | where isnotempty(tostring(id)) | extend _id = tostring(id), _hardwareId = tostring(hardwareId), _hostType = tostring(type), _ipAddress = tostring(ipAddress), _owner = tobool(owner), _isBlocked = tobool(isBlocked), _registrationTime = tostring(registrationTime), _lastConnectionStateChange = tostring(lastConnectionStateChange), _latestBackupTime = tostring(latestBackupTime), _userData = userData, _reportedState = reportedState, TimeGenerated = now() | project-away id, hardwareId, type, ipAddress, owner, isBlocked, registrationTime, lastConnectionStateChange, latestBackupTime, userData, reportedState | project-rename Id = _id, HardwareId = _hardwareId, HostType = _hostType, IpAddress = _ipAddress, Owner = _owner, IsBlocked = _isBlocked, RegistrationTime = _registrationTime, LastConnectionStateChange = _lastConnectionStateChange, LatestBackupTime = _latestBackupTime, UserData = _userData, ReportedState = _reportedState

source | where isnotempty(tostring(hostId)) and isnotempty(tostring(siteId)) | extend _metricType = tostring(metricType), _hostId = tostring(hostId), _siteId = tostring(siteId), _periods = periods, TimeGenerated = now() | project-away metricType, hostId, siteId, periods | project-rename MetricType = _metricType, HostId = _hostId, SiteId = _siteId, Periods = _periods
